title.en: China-to-Uganda Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Uganda UNBS PVoC import conformity, ERA licensing and electricity-sector requirements, UMEME/UEDCL utility connection review, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface expectations, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence, and Uganda 50 Hz 240/415 V grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与乌干达UNBS PVoC进口合格评定、ERA许可和电力行业要求、UMEME/UEDCL公用事业接入审查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据及乌干达50 Hz 240/415 V电网参数——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與烏干達UNBS PVoC進口合格評定、ERA許可和電力行業要求、UMEME/UEDCL公用事業接入審查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據及烏干達50 Hz 240/415 V電網參數——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, UNBS PVoC conformity scope determination, ERA licence or permit decision, UMEME/UEDCL connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Uganda standards, PVoC categories and Certificate of Conformity process, ERA licensing and guideline instruments, utility connection requirements, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、UNBS PVoC合格评定范围裁定、ERA许可证或许可决定、UMEME/UEDCL接入批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行乌干达标准、PVoC类别和合格证书流程、ERA许可及指南文件、公用事业接入要求及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、UNBS PVoC合格評定範圍裁定、ERA許可證或許可決定、UMEME/UEDCL接入批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏干達標準、PVoC類別和合格證書流程、ERA許可及指南文件、公用事業接入要求及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Uganda, the key practical gaps are: (1) UNBS PVoC pre-export conformity for electrical/electronic goods including solar equipment and the related Certificate of Conformity; (2) ERA licensing, permit, guideline, or project approval requirements where the inverter is part of a generation, mini-grid, off-grid, C&I, or grid-connected project; (3) UMEME/UEDCL/UETCL connection review and commissioning evidence for grid-tied projects; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence; and (5) firmware validation against Uganda's 50 Hz, 240/415 V grid. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines are useful technical references but are not automatically accepted as Uganda import, ERA, or utility connection approvals.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口乌干达时，主要实际差距包括：（1）UNBS PVoC对包括太阳能设备在内的电气电子货物实施装运前合格评定及相关合格证书；（2）逆变器用于发电、微电网、离网、工商业或并网项目时的ERA许可证、许可、指南或项目审批要求；（3）并网项目的UMEME/UEDCL/UETCL接入审查和投运证据；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据及IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据；（5）针对乌干达50 Hz、240/415 V电网的固件验证。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准可作为技术参考，但不会自动被接受为乌干达进口、ERA或公用事业接入批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口烏干達時，主要實際差距包括：（1）UNBS PVoC對包括太陽能設備在內的電氣電子貨物實施裝運前合格評定及相關合格證書；（2）逆變器用於發電、微電網、離網、工商業或併網項目時的ERA許可證、許可、指南或項目審批要求；（3）併網項目的UMEME/UEDCL/UETCL接入審查和投運證據；（4）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據及IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據；（5）針對烏干達50 Hz、240/415 V電網的韌體驗證。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準可作為技術參考，但不會自動被接受為烏干達進口、ERA或公用事業接入批准。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
